items.line_en: International law. What is it? Well, perhaps it's best to start with what it's not.

coach.say: International law. What is it? Well, perhaps it's best to start with what it's not.
coach.hint: Chunk it: International law. / What is it? / Well, / perhaps it's best to start with what it's not.

items.line_en: It's not a single official big book of laws and it's not enforced by an international

coach.say: It's not a single official big book of laws and it's not enforced by an international
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's not a single official big book of laws and / it's not enforced by an international

items.line_en: police and cases are not heard by a single court. No, it's a little more complicated than this.

coach.say: police and cases are not heard by a single court. No, it's a little more complicated than this.
coach.hint: Chunk it: police and cases are not heard by a single court. / No, / it's a little more complicated than this.

items.line_en: Instead, it's a set of agreements and customs that most countries follow most of the time.

coach.say: Instead, it's a set of agreements and customs that most countries follow most of the time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Instead, / it's a set of agreements and customs that most countries follow most of the time.

items.line_en: These agreements cover the rights and duties of states about things like war, human rights,

coach.say: These agreements cover the rights and duties of states about things like war, human rights,
coach.hint: Chunk it: These agreements cover the rights and duties of states about things like war, / human rights,

items.line_en: trade and diplomacy. They can be treaties written agreements that countries sign like a contract

coach.say: trade and diplomacy. They can be treaties written agreements that countries sign like a contract
coach.hint: Chunk it: trade and diplomacy. / They can be treaties written agreements that countries sign like a contract

items.line_en: or they can be what law calls customs. These are principles and ideas that many already follow.

coach.say: or they can be what law calls customs. These are principles and ideas that many already follow.
coach.hint: Chunk it: or they can be what law calls customs. / These are principles and ideas that many already follow.

items.line_en: These agreements only apply to countries, not companies or individuals.

coach.say: These agreements only apply to countries, not companies or individuals.
coach.hint: Chunk it: These agreements only apply to countries, / not companies or individuals.

items.line_en: And this can get complicated because some corporations are bigger than countries.

coach.say: And this can get complicated because some corporations are bigger than countries.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And this can get complicated because / some corporations are bigger than countries.

items.line_en: All this means international law has to keep evolving to fit our changing world.

coach.say: All this means international law has to keep evolving to fit our changing world.
